summary: Implemented US-006: CSV loading and parsing. Created parseCardCsv.ts with PapaParse-based parser that maps PascalCase CSV columns to camelCase Card interface fields with full validation (cardNumber, category, tier, prompt, guidance, flavourText, pairsWith). Created loadCardDeck.ts using Vite ?raw import for build-time CSV bundling. Updated data/index.ts barrel exports. Fixed a quoting bug in card_deck.csv row 46 where commas in the Prompt field were unquoted. Installed papaparse and @types/papaparse. All 87 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.
